## 🛠️ Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (existing functionality changes)
- [ ] 📝 Docs only
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)

- [ ] 🧪 Tests only

## 📋 Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing patterns in this repo
- [ ] Tested on the actual target host (Pi 5 / Pulsar0100 / browser)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Memory footprint considered (Pi 5 is sharing 16GB with Ollama/Weaviate/Docker)
- [ ] Docs / README / CLAUDE.md updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
